zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Agnes Jane Darrell於1415年出生在英國英格蘭肯特蕾托 哈特時，她的父親Sir John Darell29歲，母親Florence Darell Chichley31歲。她於大約1430年與John Jernegan在英國肯特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1460年在英國英格蘭素福爾可索莫利頓享年45歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特蕾托 哈特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Agnes Jane Darrell于1415年出生在英国英格兰肯特蕾托 哈特时，她的父亲Sir John Darell29岁，母亲Florence Darell Chichley31岁。她于大约1430年与John Jernegan在英国肯特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1460年在英国英格兰素福爾可索莫利頓享年45岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特蕾托 哈特。

nameMeanings.name: Darrell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’, for someone from Airelle in Calvados, France, or Airel in La Manche, Normandy. Compare Dorrell .

variants.name: Dural
meanings: Turkish: ornamental name or nickname from dural ‘always the same’.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

nameMeanings.name: Jane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

variants.name: Jayne
meanings: Elaborated spelling of   Jane  , a form popularized no doubt by the American actress  Jayne Mansfield  (  Vera Jayne Palmer ,  1933–67 ) and British ice-dancer  Jayne Torvill  (  b. 1957 ).

variants.name: Jain
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Agnes Jane Darrell was born in 1415, in Little Chart, Kent, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John Darell, was 29 and her mother, Florence Darell Chichley, was 31. She married John Jernegan about 1430, in Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1460, in Somerleyton, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 45, and was buried in Little Chart, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Agnes Jane Darrell est née en 1415, à Little Chart, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Darell, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Florence Darell Chichley, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé John Jernegan environ 1430, à Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1460, à Somerleyton, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterrée à Little Chart, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat um 1430 in Kent, England John Jernegan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. ja.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes Jane Darrellが1415年にイギリスイギリスケントリットル チャートで生まれた時，父Sir John Darellは29歳，母Florence Darell Chichleyは31歳であった。約1430年にイギリスケントでJohn Jerneganと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1460年にイギリスイギリススフォルクソメルリートンで45歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントリットル チャートにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes Jane Darrell(이)가 1415년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 리틀 처트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Darell(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Florence Darell Chichley(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 대략 1430년 영국 켄트에서 John Jernegan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1460년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 서머리턴에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 리틀 처트에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Agnes Jane Darrell родилась в 1415 г. в местности литл чарт, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John Darell было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Florence Darell Chichley, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Jernegan около 1430 г. в местности кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1460 г. в местности сомирлитон, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет и была похоронена в местности литл чарт, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.
